title: HP Elite x360 1040 14 inch G11 2-in-1 Notebook PC Wolf Pro Security Edition
subtitle: HP Elite x360 1040
overview: Break barriers with the highly secure, ultra-light, and responsibly crafted HP Elite x360 1040 enhanced by AI. This PC dynamically anticipates and adjusts settings for power, audio, and video features to deliver the performance, comfort, and battery life today’s business leaders need.
key_features: Power and elegance in one: Embrace the power of AI features in the redesigned HP Elite x360 1040 with HP Smart Sense.[3]
AI-driven audio and video: Look and sound your best with a 5MP IR camera, automatic framing[5], and Dynamic Voice Leveling.[4]
Protected by HP Wolf Security: HP Wolf Security for Business creates a hardware-enforced, always-on, resilient defense.[6]
Help protect our shared future: 70-percent of major parts on this PC contain recycled materials like fishing net in the keyboard.[7]
warranty: 1 year (1/1/0) limited warranty includes 1 year of parts and labor. No on-site repair. Terms and conditions vary by country. Certain restrictions and exclusions apply.
